summary: Warm‑up‑delayed yet enjoyable show highlighted by Way to Go Home and Smokestack Lightnin', captured from an unknown source of fair clarity.
review: The performance is generally praised – despite Jerry taking a few minutes to warm up, the set shines on Way to Go Home and Smokestack Lightin'. Fans recall a groggy start due to heat but describe the overall vibe as great with enthusiastic crowds. No concrete details about the recording method were given, so the audio is assumed to be listenable but not exceptional.
